Tools and scripts for testing, debugging, profiling, resource management, and firmware deployment in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[activity](activity/README.md)**: Scripts for testing FFT algorithms, generating and parsing activity data, and plotting statistics.
- **[arc](arc/README.md)**: Extends ArcanistConfiguration, manages workflows, and includes PHP classes for linting integration.
- **[clang_compat](clang_compat/README.md)**: Bindings and static definitions for the Clang compiler and indexing library, Apache License 2.0.
- **[clar](clar/README.md)**: Tools and functions for generating, managing, and executing Clar test suites and related operations.
- **[commander](commander/README.md)**: Command modules for various functionalities, command interface for PULSE systems, custom exceptions, and parsers.
- **[font](font/README.md)**: Tools for font data extraction, codepoint generation, and rendering TrueType fonts for Pebble firmware.
- **[gdb_scripts](gdb_scripts/README.md)**: GDB scripts for heap analysis, data parsing, pretty-printing, path modification, symbol extraction, and debugging.
- **[generate_native_sdk](generate_native_sdk/README.md)**: Fake libc headers, exported symbols, SDK generation scripts, and documentation for Pebble firmware.
- **[generate_pdcs](generate_pdcs/README.md)**: Tools for converting SVG and JSON files into Pebble Draw Commands and PDC binary format, with graph utilities.
- **[generate_watchface](generate_watchface/README.md)**: Configuration and templates for generating Pebble watch faces with scripts and C code.
- **[js](js/README.md)**: A script to read and print headers and literals from a binary snapshot file.
- **[log_hashing](log_hashing/README.md)**: Log hashing tools for checking, dehashing, and parsing logs with support for serial communication.
- **[pdc2png](pdc2png/README.md)**: Converts PDC files to PNG format and includes a build script for compiling the tool.
- **[power_monitor](power_monitor/README.md)**: I2C communication and power monitoring tools using INA226 sensors and MCP23009 GPIO expander.
- **[power_profiling](power_profiling/README.md)**: JavaScript and HTML files for power profiling visualization using Dygraph, and an MIT License file.
- **[profiling](profiling/README.md)**: Profiling functionality for capturing and viewing program counter samples from a board.
- **[pulse](pulse/README.md)**: Tool extensions for flash imaging, logging, prompt protocols, and PULSE serial protocol in pebble-firmware.
- **[qemu](qemu/README.md)**: A GDB server proxy for QEMU with FreeRTOS thread inspection and advanced GDB commands.
- **[qemu_spi_cooker](qemu/README.md_spi_cooker)**: Prepares a QEMU SPI image file and includes a build script for compiling the qemu_spi_cooker program.
- **[resources](resources/README.md)**: Resource generation classes, license management, Waf tools, initialization, filename finder, and redesign plan.
- **[svg2png](svg2png/README.md)**: Setup and build scripts for packaging and converting SVG files to PNG using py2app.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Test data and unit tests for various modules, including JSON, Vibe, ELF, HDLC, and Pebble app functionalities.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies that `serial_dump.txt` should be ignored by Git.
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[accessory_flash_imaging.py](accessory_flash_imaging.py.md)**: Tool for loading and reading binary data into Pebble's external flash storage via the accessory port.
- **[accessory_imaging.py](accessory_imaging.py.md)**: Implements accessory imaging functions for communication and data transfer with a device via serial port.
- **[analyze_fw_static_memory_usage.py](analyze_fw_static_memory_usage.py.md)**: Analyzes static memory usage of firmware by processing ELF and map files, and categorizes text sections.
- **[analyze_mcu_flash_config.py](analyze_mcu_flash_config.py.md)**: Analyzes MCU flash configuration using different ELF configurations for memory regions.
- **[analyze_mcu_flash_find_unclaimed.py](analyze_mcu_flash_find_unclaimed.py.md)**: Analyzes MCU flash memory to find and report unclaimed regions in an ELF file.
- **[analyze_mcu_flash_usage_treemap.html](analyze_mcu_flash_usage_treemap.html.md)**: HTML and JavaScript for visualizing MCU flash usage with a treemap layout.
- **[analyze_mcu_flash_usage_treemap.py](analyze_mcu_flash_usage_treemap.py.md)**: Analyzes MCU flash usage and generates a JSON treemap for visualization with d3.js.
- **[analyze_pdebug_dat.py](analyze_pdebug_dat.py.md)**: Processes and analyzes task profiling data from waf's parallel_debug.py to summarize task durations.
- **[analyze_static_memory_layout.py](analyze_static_memory_layout.py.md)**: Analyzes the static memory layout of an ELF file for specific RAM and CCM sections.
- **[analyze_static_memory_usage.py](analyze_static_memory_usage.py.md)**: Analyzes static memory usage of ELF files with options for verbosity, summary, and speed.
- **[animation_timing_tables.py](animation_timing_tables.py.md)**: Generates animation timing tables using ease-in, ease-out, and ease-in-out functions.
- **[app_header.py](app_header.py.md)**: Defines the `PebbleAppHeader` class for serializing and deserializing Pebble app binary headers.
- **[applib_malloc.py](applib_malloc.py.md)**: Tools for generating C header and implementation files from JSON data, including size calculations and padding for struct types.
- **[applib_malloc.template.c](applib_malloc.template.c.md)**: Implements memory allocation functions with support for different app versions and instrumentation.
- **[applib_malloc.template.h](applib_malloc.template.h.md)**: Memory allocation functions and macros for applib, including malloc, zalloc, and free operations.
- **[applib_malloc_type.template.c](applib_malloc_type.template.c.md)**: Template for memory allocation functions with size checks for different SDK versions.
- **[applib_malloc_type.template.h](applib_malloc_type.template.h.md)**: Template for memory allocation functions with customizable type names.
- **[audio_recording.py](audio_recording.py.md)**: Records PCM encoded audio data from a serial port and saves it as a .wav file.
- **[bamboo_deploy.sh](bamboo_deploy.sh.md)**: Shell script for deploying firmware bundles to a specified environment and bucket in the Pebble firmware project.
- **[battery_curve.py](battery_curve.py.md)**: Generates battery power curves from CSV data, with options for graphing and discharge analysis.
- **[binutils.py](binutils.py.md)**: Tools for analyzing and manipulating ELF files, including symbol extraction and section management.
- **[bitmapgen.py](bitmapgen.py.md)**: A tool for converting PNG images to Pebble-compatible bitmap formats, including PBI and header files.
- **[bootloader_test.py](bootloader_test.py.md)**: Tool to test bootloader updating routines for firmware and PRF on specified board types.
- **[build_timing.py](build_timing.py.md)**: Script to check task timing in Bamboo build logs using regex and argparse for verbosity control.
- **[cat_resource_table.py](cat_resource_table.py.md)**: Parses and displays resource information from a resource pack and manifest file.
- **[commander.py](commander/README.md.py)**: A command-line tool for interacting with Pebble devices, supporting verbose logging and serial port configuration.
- **[crash_stats.py](crash_stats.py.md)**: Analyzes firmware crash statistics using event or hourly analytics and generates reports.
- **[deploy_pbz_to_pebblefw.py](deploy_pbz_to_pebblefw.py.md)**: Script for deploying Pebble firmware bundles to S3 with options for stages and dry-run mode.
- **[elf2bin.sh](elf2bin.sh.md)**: Converts ELF files to binary format using `arm-none-eabi-objcopy`.
- **[elf2hex.sh](elf2hex.sh.md)**: Converts an ELF file to a HEX file using arm-none-eabi-objcopy.
- **[elf_sections.py](elf_sections.py.md)**: Analyzes .elf files to display section information, sorted by start address, with memory gaps/overlaps.
- **[fw_binary_info.py](fw_binary_info.py.md)**: Extracts and parses firmware binary information from .bin or .elf files for Pebble devices.
- **[fw_elf_obfuscate.py](fw_elf_obfuscate.py.md)**: Script for obfuscating ELF files by preserving and obfuscating specific sections and symbols.
- **[gdb_driver.py](gdb_driver.py.md)**: GDB driver and interface for managing GDB sessions with ARM targets.
- **[generate_appinfo.py](generate_appinfo.py.md)**: Parses `appinfo.json` and generates a C file for building into the Pebble app binary.
- **[generate_c_byte_array.py](generate_c_byte_array.py.md)**: Generates a C byte array from input bytes and writes it to a file with a specified variable name.
- **[generate_codepoint_requirements.py](generate_codepoint_requirements.py.md)**: Generates a JSON file of required codepoints from a PO file of translated strings.
- **[generate_trig_table.py](generate_trig_table.py.md)**: Generates and prints sine and arctangent tables using Python's math library.
- **[get_app_uuid.py](get_app_uuid.py.md)**: Generates and prints a UUID in byte and string format from a given input or creates a new one.
- **[hdlc.py](hdlc.py.md)**: Implements HDLC encoding and decoding for data frames with escape character handling.
- **[img2packbits.rb](img2packbits.rb.md)**: Converts an image to PackBits format and writes the compressed data to a file.
- **[insert_firmware_descr.py](insert_firmware_descr.py.md)**: Inserts a firmware description structure into a binary file for Pebble firmware.
- **[json2vibe.py](js/README.mdon2vibe.py)**: Converts JSON files to VIBE format for Pebble firmware using defined data structures and serialization.
- **[list_bss_memory_hogs.py](list_bss_memory_hogs.py.md)**: Lists the top 25 BSS memory hogs from a firmware ELF file using objdump and awk.
- **[make_ev2-1_firmware.sh](make_ev2-1_firmware.sh.md)**: Builds and packages the Pebble EV2-1 firmware into a compressed zip file.
- **[metrics_to_xml.py](metrics_to_xml.py.md)**: Parses firmware sizes and generates an XML file for Jenkins plot plugin consumption.
- **[mkbundle.py](mkbundle.py.md)**: Creates Pebble firmware and watchapp bundles with support for various components and configurations.
- **[mpu_calc.py](mpu_calc.py.md)**: Calculates MPU region configurations to match specific address and size requirements.
- **[parse_dump_malloc.py](parse_dump_malloc.py.md)**: Analyzes memory allocation and generates a visual representation of heap usage from input data.
- **[pbi2png.py](pbi2png.py.md)**: Converts PBI image files to PNG format using Python and the PIL library.
- **[pbi2png.sh](pbi2png.sh.md)**: Converts .pbi files to .png using a Python script.
- **[pbpack.py](pbpack.py.md)**: Tools for (de)serializing Pebble resource pack files, including command-line metadata dumping.
- **[pbpack_meta_data.py](pbpack_meta_data.py.md)**: Generates metadata chunks for pbpack files using command-line arguments.
- **[pbz2base64.py](pbz2base64.py.md)**: Unpacks a Pebble bundle's binary payload into Base64 format for serial loading.
- **[pebble_ftdi_custom_pids.py](pebble_ftdi_custom_pids.py.md)**: Configures custom FTDI device PIDs using the PyFtdi library.
- **[pebble_image_routines.py](pebble_image_routines.py.md)**: Image and color conversion routines for Pebble devices, supporting pebble64 and pebble2 palettes.
- **[pebble_sdk_platform.py](pebble_sdk_platform.py.md)**: Defines platform configurations for various Pebble devices and conditionally imports internal SDK components.
- **[pebble_sdk_platform_internal.py](pebble_sdk_platform_internal.py.md)**: Extends `pebble_platforms` with non-public and legacy Pebble platforms.
- **[pebble_tty.py](pebble_tty.py.md)**: Detects and manages TTY devices for accessory, debug serial, and BLE connections on macOS.
- **[pebble_tty_native.py](pebble_tty_native.py.md)**: Functions to find and select the correct TTY device on macOS and Linux platforms.
- **[pebble_tty_pyftdi.py](pebble_tty_pyftdi.py.md)**: Tools for managing and identifying USB TTY devices using PyFTDI in the Pebble firmware.
- **[png2pblpng.py](png2pblpng.py.md)**: Converts PNG files to Pebble-compatible PNGs with color reduction and palette options.
- **[power_parser.py](power_parser.py.md)**: Parses power profiling data from serial input and writes averaged power data to an output file.
- **[pretty_print_bt_log.py](pretty_print_bt_log.py.md)**: Pretty prints wire-optimized Pebble Bluetooth logs from a specified file.
- **[prompt.py](prompt.py.md)**: Tools for interacting with a microcontroller via a serial port, including command execution and session management.
- **[pulse_console.py](pulse/README.md_console.py)**: A console tool for interacting with Pebble devices, handling commands and logging with dehashing.
- **[pulse_flash_imaging.py](pulse/README.md_flash_imaging.py)**: A factory tool to load binary data into Pebble's external flash storage.
- **[pulse_legacy_flash_imaging.py](pulse/README.md_legacy_flash_imaging.py)**: A factory tool to load binary data into Pebble's external flash storage.
- **[pulse_read.py](pulse/README.md_read.py)**: Tool for loading binary data from Pebble devices via various read operations.
- **[put_bundle_to_s3.py](put_bundle_to_s3.py.md)**: Uploads firmware bundles and related files to an S3 bucket, with options for different release stages.
- **[roundrect.py](roundrect.py.md)**: Generates rounded rectangle insets as packed 4-bit uints and writes them to a header file.
- **[screenshot_new.py](screenshot_new.py.md)**: Tool to take a Pebble screenshot over serial and save it as a PNG file.
- **[serial_port_wrapper.py](serial_port_wrapper.py.md)**: A threaded wrapper for serial port communication with logging and read/write capabilities.
- **[sniff_count_analysis.py](sniff_count_analysis.py.md)**: Script to analyze and sum `hci_active_mode_XXX` logs by debug tag from a log file.
- **[snowy_colors.py](snowy_colors.py.md)**: Tools for downloading, caching, and processing color data from ColourLovers and Wikipedia, and generating various output formats.
- **[snowy_colors_wikipedia.json](snowy_colors_wikipedia.json.md)**: Contains JSON color definitions with names, RGB values, and Wikipedia URLs for reference in applications.
- **[stm32_crc.py](stm32_crc.py.md)**: Calculates CRC32 checksums for data buffers and files using a precomputed lookup table.
- **[strip_xcode_paths.py](strip_xcode_paths.py.md)**: Removes XCode-inserted directories from the PATH environment variable during a waf build.
- **[struct_sizes.py](struct_sizes.py.md)**: Extracts and logs the sizes of structures from an ELF file using DWARF debugging information.
- **[timezones.py](timezones.py.md)**: Parses Olson timezone database files to generate timezone and DST rule data in text and binary formats.
- **[tool_check.py](tool_check.py.md)**: Checks and verifies package requirements for macOS using pip and Homebrew.
- **[unpack.py](unpack.py.md)**: Unpacks pbpacked data files to recover original file content using command-line arguments.
- **[update_test_system_pbpack.sh](update_test_system_pbpack.sh.md)**: Bash script to update test system resources for different platforms in the Pebble firmware.
- **[upload_lang_pack.py](upload_lang_pack.py.md)**: Uploads and manages language packs for Pebble firmware using HTTP authentication and S3 storage.
- **[voltage_test.py](voltage_test.py.md)**: A script for testing voltage over time with options for output format and retry attempts.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration script for different build variants in the pebble-firmware project.
